prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东华大学在青海省理科最低录取位次分别约为13000名、12000名、13000名、13500名、14000名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1000名；20 25年基准位次约14000名；2021–2025年理科招生计划均为10人，2026年计划仍为10人，招生规模连续6年持平，无扩招或缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第77名，近年排名稳定，属于中上层次全国重点大学；2025年声誉评价偏正面，主要原因包括纺织特 色鲜明、就业稳定；抖音热度一般，未见明显投档异常或断档记录，报考心理整体平稳；纺织科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、材料科学与工程A-、设计学A-，与该 校招生专业高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 纺织工程、材料类等专业社会热度平稳；计算机类偏热、设计学类较热；青海省理科考生总数从20 21年约2.4万持续增长至2026年约2.9万，累计增幅约20%，竞争环境逐年趋紧，反映整体难度略升；东华大学位于上海（一线城市），对西部省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生占比约0.3%–0.5%，属于小规模招生省份，边际变化敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历 年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、青海省理科考生持续增长（2026年约2.9万），在2025年基准14000名基础上预计最低录取位次小幅后移；预 测最低位次约14150名，区间13650–14650名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Donghua University in Qinghai Province's science category were approximately 13000, 12000, 13000, 13500, and 14000, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14000; the science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 10 students each year, and the 2026 plan remains 10 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for 6 consecutive years, no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking is about 77th, stable in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level national key university; the reputation evaluation in 2025 is relatively positive, mainly due to distinctive textile characteristics and stable employment; Douyin popularity is average, no obvious abnormal filing or gap records, overall application psychology is stable; Textile Science and Engineering A+ (national top), Materials Science and Engineering A-, Design A-, highly related to the university's enrollment majors, strongly attractive to candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors like Textile Engineering and Materials is stable; Computer Science is relatively hot, Design is quite hot; the total number of science candidates in Qinghai Province has continuously increased from about 24000 in 2021 to about 29000 in 2026, a cumulative increase of about 20%, the competitive environment is tightening year by year, reflecting a slight increase in overall difficulty; Donghua University is located in Shanghai (first-tier city), which has certain regional appeal to candidates from western provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is about 0.3%–0.5%, belonging to small-scale enrollment provinces, sensitive to marginal changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the continuous growth of science candidates in Qinghai Province (about 29000 in 2026), based on the 2025 baseline of 14000, the minimum admission ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14150, with a range of 13650–14650.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13650–14650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Textile Engineering, Materials, Mechanical Engineering, Automation) as the main choices; if your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<13650), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>14650), use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Donghua University's Textile Science and Engineering A+ discipline is nationally leading, and related majors offer high cost-performance, worth special attention.
